revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Languages of Taiwan | title = [[Languages of Taiwan]] | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | listclass = hlist
| group1 = [[Austronesian languages|Austronesian]] | list1 = {{Navbox|child
| group1 = [[Formosan languages|Formosan]] | list1 = {{Navbox|child
| group1 = [[Atayalic languages|Atayalic]] | list1 = * [[Atayal language|Atayal]] * [[Seediq language|Seediq]] ** [[Truku language|Truku]]
| group2 = Rukaic | list2 = * [[Rukai language|Rukai]]
| group3 = [[Northern Formosan languages|Northern]] | list3 = * [[Babuza language|Babuza]] ** [[Favorlang language|Favorlang]] ** [[Taokas language|Taokas]] * [[Papora-Hoanya language|Papora]] * [[Papora-Hoanya language|Hoanya]] **[[Papora-Hoanya language|Arikun]] **[[Papora-Hoanya language|Lloa]] * [[Pazeh language|Pazeh]] ** Kaxabu * [[Kulon language|Kulon]] * [[Saisiyat language|Saisiyat]] * [[Thao language|Thao]]
| group4 = [[East Formosan languages|East]] | list4 = * [[Amis language|Amis]] * [[Kavalan language|Kavalan]] * [[Ketagalan language|Ketagalan]] ** [[Basay language|Basay]] ** [[Luilang language|Luilang]] * [[Makatao language|Makatao]] * [[Qauqaut language|Qauqaut]] * [[Sakizaya language|Sakizaya]] * [[Siraya language|Siraya]] * [[Taivoan language|Taivoan]]
| group5 = Southern | list5 = * [[Bunun language|Bunun]] * [[Paiwan language|Paiwan]] * [[Puyuma language|Puyuma]]
| group6 = [[Tsouic languages|Tsouic]] | list6 = * [[Kanakanavu language|Kanakanavu]] * [[Saaroa language|Saaroa]] * [[Tsou language|Tsou]]
}}
<!-- group2 omitted to preserve alternating striping -->
| group3 = [[Malayo-Polynesian languages|Malayo-Polynesian]] | list3 = {{Navbox|child | group1 = [[Batanic languages|Batanic]] | list1 = * [[Yami language|Yami]] }} }}
| group2 = [[Sino-Tibetan languages|Sino-Tibetan]] | list2 = {{Navbox|child | evenodd = swap
| group1 = [[Sinitic languages|Sinitic]] | list1 = {{Navbox|child
| group1 = [[Mandarin Chinese|Mandarin]] | list1 = * [[Taiwanese Mandarin]] * [[Junjiahua|Junhua]]
| group2 = [[Min Chinese|Min]] | list2 = {{Navbox|child
| group1 = [[Southern Min|Southern]] | list1 = * [[Taiwanese Hokkien]] * [[Teochew dialect]] | group2 = [[Eastern Min|Eastern]] | list2 = * [[Fuzhounese]] ** [[Matsu dialect]] | group3 = [[Pu-Xian Min|Pu-Xian]] | list3 = * [[Putian dialect]] (Wuqiu dialect) }} | group3 = [[Hakka Chinese|Hakka]] | list3 = * [[Taiwanese Hakka]] ** [[Sixian dialect|Sixian]] ** [[Hailu dialect|Hailu]] ** [[Dabu dialect|Dabu]] ** [[Raoping dialect|Raoping]] ** [[Zhao'an dialect|Zhao'an]]
}}
}} | group4 = [[Japanese Sign Language family|Japonic Sign]] | list4 = * [[Taiwan Sign Language]]
| group5 = Auxiliary | list5 = * [[Taiwanese Braille]]
| group6 = Other languages | list6 = * [[English language|English]] * [[Cantonese]] * [[Wu Chinese|Wu]] ** [[Shanghainese]] * [[Filipino language|Filipino]] * [[Japanese language|Japanese]] * [[Korean language|Korean]] * [[Malay language|Malay]] ** [[Malaysian language|Malaysian]] ** [[Indonesian language|Indonesian]] * [[Thai language|Thai]] * [[Vietnamese language|Vietnamese]] * [[Yilan Creole Japanese|Yilan Creole Japanese]] }} <noinclude> {{navbox documentation}} [[Category:Asia language templates|Taiwan]] [[Category:Taiwan navigational boxes]] [[Category:Taiwan society and social science templates]] </noinclude>

{{Navbox | name = Languages of Taiwan | title = [[:en:Languages of Taiwan|Languages of Taiwan]] | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | listclass = hlist
| group1 = [[:en:Austronesian languages|Austronesian]] | list1 = {{Navbox|child
| group1 = [[:en:Formosan languages|Formosan]] | list1 = {{Navbox|child
| group1 = [[:en:Atayalic languages|Atayalic]] | list1 = * [[:en:Atayal language|Atayal]] * [[Seediq language|Seediq]] ** [[Truku language|Truku]]
| group2 = Rukaic | list2 = * [[Rukai language|Rukai]]
| group3 = [[Northern Formosan languages|Northern]] | list3 = * [[:en:Babuza language|Babuza]] ** [[:en:Favorlang language|Favorlang]] ** [[Taokas language|Taokas]] * [[Papora-Hoanya language|Papora]] * [[Papora-Hoanya language|Hoanya]] **[[Papora-Hoanya language|Arikun]] **[[Papora-Hoanya language|Lloa]] * [[Pazeh language|Pazeh]] ** Kaxabu * [[:en:Kulon language|Kulon]] * [[Saisiyat language|Saisiyat]] * [[Thao language|Thao]]
| group4 = [[:en:East Formosan languages|East]] | list4 = * [[:en:Amis language|Amis]] * [[:en:Kavalan language|Kavalan]] * [[:en:Ketagalan language|Ketagalan]] ** [[:en:Basay language|Basay]] ** [[:en:Luilang language|Luilang]] * [[Makatao language|Makatao]] * [[Qauqaut language|Qauqaut]] * [[Sakizaya language|Sakizaya]] * [[Siraya language|Siraya]] * [[Taivoan language|Taivoan]]
| group5 = Southern | list5 = * [[:en:Bunun language|Bunun]] * [[Paiwan language|Paiwan]] * [[Puyuma language|Puyuma]]
| group6 = [[Tsouic languages|Tsouic]] | list6 = * [[:en:Kanakanavu language|Kanakanavu]] * [[Saaroa language|Saaroa]] * [[Tsou language|Tsou]]
}}
<!-- group2 omitted to preserve alternating striping -->
| group3 = [[Malayo-Polynesian languages|Malayo-Polynesian]] | list3 = {{Navbox|child | group1 = [[:en:Batanic languages|Batanic]] | list1 = * [[Yami language|Yami]] }} }}
| group2 = [[Sino-Tibetan languages|Sino-Tibetan]] | list2 = {{Navbox|child | evenodd = swap

| group2 = [[Min Chinese|Min]] | list2 = {{Navbox|child
| group1 = [[Southern Min|Southern]] | list1 = * [[Taiwanese Hokkien]] * [[Teochew dialect]] | group2 = [[:en:Eastern Min|Eastern]] | list2 = * [[:en:Fuzhounese|Fuzhounese]] ** [[Matsu dialect]] | group3 = [[Pu-Xian Min|Pu-Xian]] | list3 = * [[Putian dialect]] (Wuqiu dialect) }} | group3 = [[:en:Hakka Chinese|Hakka]] | list3 = * [[Taiwanese Hakka]] ** [[Sixian dialect|Sixian]] ** [[:en:Hailu dialect|Hailu]] ** [[Dabu dialect|Dabu]] ** [[Raoping dialect|Raoping]] ** [[Zhao'an dialect|Zhao'an]]
}}
}} | group4 = [[:en:Japanese Sign Language family|Japonic Sign]] | list4 = * [[Taiwan Sign Language]]
| group5 = Auxiliary | list5 = * [[Taiwanese Braille]]
| group6 = Other languages | list6 = * [[:en:English language|English]] * [[:en:Cantonese|Cantonese]] * [[Wu Chinese|Wu]] ** [[Shanghainese]] * [[:en:Filipino language|Filipino]] * [[:en:Japanese language|Japanese]] * [[:en:Korean language|Korean]] * [[:en:Malay language|Malay]] ** [[Malaysian language|Malaysian]] ** [[:en:Indonesian language|Indonesian]] * [[Thai language|Thai]] * [[Vietnamese language|Vietnamese]] * [[Yilan Creole Japanese|Yilan Creole Japanese]] }} <noinclude> {{navbox documentation}} [[Category:Asia language templates|Taiwan]] [[Category:Taiwan navigational boxes]]
</noinclude>

| group1 = [[:en:Austronesian languages|Austronesian]] | list1 = {{Navbox|child
| group1 = [[:en:Formosan languages|Formosan]] | list1 = {{Navbox|child
| group1 = [[:en:Atayalic languages|Atayalic]] | list1 = * [[:en:Atayal language|Atayal]] * [[:en:Seediq language|Seediq]] ** [[:en:Truku language|Truku]]
| group2 = Rukaic | list2 = * [[:en:Rukai language|Rukai]]
| group3 = [[:en:Northern Formosan languages|Northern]] | list3 = * [[:en:Babuza language|Babuza]] ** [[:en:Favorlang language|Favorlang]] ** [[:en:Taokas language|Taokas]] * [[:en:Papora-Hoanya language|Papora]] * [[:en:Papora-Hoanya language|Hoanya]] **[[:en:Papora-Hoanya language|Arikun]] **[[:en:Papora-Hoanya language|Lloa]] * [[:en:Pazeh language|Pazeh]] ** Kaxabu * [[:en:Kulon language|Kulon]] * [[:en:Saisiyat language|Saisiyat]] * [[:en:Thao language|Thao]]
| group4 = [[:en:East Formosan languages|East]] | list4 = * [[:en:Amis language|Amis]] * [[:en:Kavalan language|Kavalan]] * [[:en:Ketagalan language|Ketagalan]] ** [[:en:Basay language|Basay]] ** [[:en:Luilang language|Luilang]] * [[:en:Makatao language|Makatao]] * [[:en:Qauqaut language|Qauqaut]] * [[:en:Sakizaya language|Sakizaya]] * [[:en:Siraya language|Siraya]] * [[:en:Taivoan language|Taivoan]]
| group5 = Southern | list5 = * [[:en:Bunun language|Bunun]] * [[:en:Paiwan language|Paiwan]] * [[:en:Puyuma language|Puyuma]]
| group6 = [[:en:Tsouic languages|Tsouic]] | list6 = * [[:en:Kanakanavu language|Kanakanavu]] * [[:en:Saaroa language|Saaroa]] * [[:en:Tsou language|Tsou]]
}}
<!-- group2 omitted to preserve alternating striping -->
| group3 = [[:en:Malayo-Polynesian languages|Malayo-Polynesian]] | list3 = {{Navbox|child | group1 = [[:en:Batanic languages|Batanic]] | list1 = * [[:en:Yami language|Yami]] }} }}
| group2 = [[:en:Sino-Tibetan languages|Sino-Tibetan]] | list2 = {{Navbox|child | evenodd = swap
| group1 = [[:en:Sinitic languages|Sinitic]] | list1 = {{Navbox|child
| group1 = [[:en:Mandarin Chinese|Mandarin]] | list1 = * [[:en:Taiwanese Mandarin|Taiwanese Mandarin]] * [[:en:Junjiahua|Junhua]]
| group2 = [[:en:Min Chinese|Min]] | list2 = {{Navbox|child
| group1 = [[:en:Southern Min|Southern]] | list1 = * [[:en:Taiwanese Hokkien|Taiwanese Hokkien]] * [[:en:Teochew dialect|Teochew dialect]] | group2 = [[:en:Eastern Min|Eastern]] | list2 = * [[:en:Fuzhounese|Fuzhounese]] ** [[:en:Matsu dialect|Matsu dialect]] | group3 = [[:en:Pu-Xian Min|Pu-Xian]] | list3 = * [[:en:Putian dialect|Putian dialect]] (Wuqiu dialect) }} | group3 = [[:en:Hakka Chinese|Hakka]] | list3 = * [[:en:Taiwanese Hakka|Taiwanese Hakka]] ** [[:en:Sixian dialect|Sixian]] ** [[:en:Hailu dialect|Hailu]] ** [[Dabu dialect|Dabu]] ** [[:en:Raoping dialect|Raoping]] ** [[:en:Zhao'an dialect|Zhao'an]]
}}
}} | group4 = [[:en:Japanese Sign Language family|Japonic Sign]] | list4 = * [[:en:Taiwan Sign Language|Taiwan Sign Language]]
| group5 = Auxiliary | list5 = * [[:en:Taiwanese Braille|Taiwanese Braille]]
| group6 = Other languages | list6 = * [[:en:English language|English]] * [[:en:Cantonese|Cantonese]] * [[:en:Wu Chinese|Wu]] ** [[:en:Shanghainese|Shanghainese]] * [[:en:Filipino language|Filipino]] * [[:en:Japanese language|Japanese]] * [[:en:Korean language|Korean]] * [[:en:Malay language|Malay]] ** [[:en:Malaysian language|Malaysian]] ** [[:en:Indonesian language|Indonesian]] * [[:en:Thai language|Thai]] * [[:en:Vietnamese language|Vietnamese]] * [[:en:Yilan Creole Japanese|Yilan Creole Japanese]] }} <noinclude> {{navbox documentation}} [[Category:Asia language templates|Taiwan]] [[Category:Taiwan navigational boxes]]
</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]
